case_title: SECURITIES AMERICA, INC. VS. ELLIOTT CHARLES COX
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITIONER SECURITIES AMERICA INCS PETITION TO CONFIRM FINRA ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE & PAYMENT FOR COURT REPORTER FEE (TRANSACTION ID # 200033358) FILED BY PETITIONER SECURITIES AMERICA, INC. HEARING SET FOR AUG-16-2021 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-16-2021 HEARING RE: PETITIONER SECURITIES AMERICA, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM FINRA ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE PETITION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT WHICH RECITES ALL THE TERMS OF RELIEF MADE IN THE ARBITRATION AWARD. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER SECURITIES AMERICA, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT COX, ELLIOTT CHARLES $39,628.31 PRINCIPAL, $3,871.95 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $43,500.26, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT FILED BY PETITIONER SECURITIES AMERICA, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT COX, ELLIOTT CHARLES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner Securities America Incs Petition To Confirm Finra Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER SECURITIES AMERICA, INC.'s Petition To Confirm FINRA Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for petitioner is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the petition was not opposed and a separate proposed judgment which recites all the terms of relief made in the arbitration award.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
